translations.text: No intercessor’s plea will benefit them now.
What is the matter with them? Why do they turn away from the warning,
like frightened asses
fleeing from a lion?

text_qpc_hafs: بَلۡ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيٕٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُؤۡتَىٰ صُحُفٗا مُّنَشَّرَةٗ ٥٢
text_uthmani: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً

translations.text: Each one of them demands that a scripture be sent down to him and unrolled before his very eyes-
No! Truly they have no fear of the life to come-
but truly this is a reminder.
Let whoever wishes to take heed do so:

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَا يَذۡكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ هُوَ أَهۡلُ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ وَأَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَغۡفِرَةِ ٥٦
text_uthmani: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ

translations.text: they will only take heed if God so wishes. He is the Lord who should be heeded, the Lord of forgiveness.
By the Day of Resurrection
and by the self-reproaching soul!
Does man think We shall not put his bones back together?

text_qpc_hafs: بَلَىٰ قَٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُۥ ٤
text_uthmani: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ

translations.text: In fact, We can reshape his very fingertips.
Yet man wants to deny what is ahead of him:
he says, ‘So, when will this Day of Resurrection be?’
When eyes are dazzled
and the moon eclipsed,
when the sun and the moon are brought together,
on that Day man will say, ‘Where can I escape?’
Truly, there is no refuge:
they will all return to your Lord on that Day.

text_qpc_hafs: يُنَبَّؤُاْ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ ١٣
text_uthmani: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ

translations.text: On that Day, man will be told what he put first and what he put last.
Truly, man is a clear witness against himself,
despite all the excuses he may put forward.

text_qpc_hafs: لَا تُحَرِّكۡ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعۡجَلَ بِهِۦٓ ١٦
text_uthmani: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ

translations.text: [Prophet], do not rush your tongue in an attempt to hasten [your memorization of] the Revelation:
We shall make sure of its safe collection and recitation.
When We have recited it, repeat the recitation
and We shall make it clear.
